title: AI Security Incident
description: Schema for an AI system security incident record in the AISecIncidents-2025-26 dataset.

incident_name.description: Unique descriptive name for the incident.

date.description: ISO 8601 date of incident discovery or disclosure (null if unknown).

how.description: Brief technical description of the attack vector or method.

what_exposed.description: Description of data, model, or capability that was exposed or compromised.

accessibility.description: Current accessibility status of the vulnerability or exposed data.

severity.description: Severity classification based on impact and accessibility.

urls.description: Public source URLs confirming or documenting the incident.

cve.description: CVE identifier if a formal vulnerability was assigned (null if none).

notes.description: Additional context, mitigation details, or researcher notes.

verified.description: True if the incident has at least one independently confirmed public source.

date_missing.description: True if no reliable date is available for this incident.

data_classification.description: Data sourcing classification: public_sources_only (verified, unredacted), redacted_internal_data (sanitized before publication), unverified (no public sources found).
